facebook.caption: Tourists stick to the resort beaches. The people who actually know Phu Quoc book a jungle tour at Cửa Lấp. Jerry's Jungle Tours runs small-group trips into the parts of the island most visitors never reach. 4.4 stars across 69 reviews. That rating holds because the guides know this terrain. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
